basic_details.job_title: ICFRE HFRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: ICFRE-Himalayan Forest Research Institute (HFRI) has released the official Project Assistant Notification 2026 under Advt No. 1-1(66)/HFRI/492. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the HFRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 30 years of age with a B.Sc. in Forestry or B.Sc. Medical qualification are eligible to apply. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC and women candidates as per rules. Interested candidates can submit their applications offline on or before 02 July 2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 July 2026. The official notification PDF an

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for Project Assistant. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Woman candidates.

qualification.details: Project Assistant: B.Sc. Forestry, B.Sc. Medical. Taxonomical Knowledge of medicinal plants. Experience of data collection and survey in the mountainous regions. Preference will be given to the candidate with above experience. Scope of work includes exclusive field visits for data collection from different districts of Jammu & Kashmir UT, Ladakh UT and Himachal Pradesh.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: Rs. 22,000/- Per Month Fixed

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICFRE Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICFRE HFRI Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICFRE HFRI Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICFRE Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the offline application for the ICFRE Project Assistant posts is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant position at ICFRE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. Forestry or B.Sc. Medical degree to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Assistant is 30 years, with relaxations available for SC/ST/OBC/Woman candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 22,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Applications submitted online or via email will not be considered.

faq.question: Q7. When is the interview scheduled for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview for the Project Assistant posts will be conducted on 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q8. Does ICFRE offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Woman candidates, which is 5 years.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with taxonomical knowledge of medicinal plants and experience in data collection and surveys in mountainous regions.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected candidates for the Project Assistant role be posted?
faq.answer: The scope of work includes field visits for data collection from Jammu & Kashmir UT, Ladakh UT, and Himachal Pradesh.
